New: Wenger not ruling out new deal for Cazorla – p1r.es/2qJju06 #arsenal #afc

Arsene Wenger said that Santi Cazorla could be given a contract extension, he also went on to say:

"The last news I heard is that he is doing very well, so I hope that certainly he will come back before the end of the season."

#afc

Speaking to the press this morning about the fitness of the players, Wenger said, “We have some uncertainty about Wilshere. It’s a small problem with his ankle.

“Mkhitaryan is not back, and Ospina is available again.”

The manager was asked about Aaron Ramsey, who suffered a nasty cut in the 2-2 draw with CSKA Moscow last week.

“He has not participated in full training but he is practicing in non-contact,” he said, “but he’s available for Sunday.”

As for the Armenian international, doubts that he was going to miss the rest of the season seem to have been dispelled.

“Mkhitaryan is running again,” said the Frenchman. “We has to progress him in next 3-4 days to see how much intensity we can put in his training sessions.”

And on when he might play again, he continued, “Possibly Thursday, at the earliest.”

Wenger also hinted he’d play a strong team against the Hammers despite the upcoming game with Atletico the following Thursday.

“I rested some players after Moscow, so they will need a game,” he said. “It’s not so much rest, but preparation.”

‘I think Jack will decide before the World Cup’


Jack Wilshere’s decision to stay or go this summer is still pending, but Arsene Wenger believes he will make his choice before the World Cup.

Here’s the latest update from the boss:

on Jack’s contract…
I cannot give you any news because I don’t really know what is in his mind. I can just update you by saying that until now he has not signed. He has an offer and we want him to stay. He has an offer that is on a long-term contract basically, and I hope that at some stage he will sign it.

on whether it’s hope he’ll sign rather than confidence…
You can reproach me maybe, but I’m always confident. I am confident, really.

on whether it’s better to pay Jack what he wants rather than buy a replacement…
If you think like that, there’s no limitations anywhere. As a club you want the players to stay and to be paid well, and I believe that everybody would agree that we pay our players very well.

on setting a deadline for Jack's decision…
No, no. He has the freedom to make that decision, he knows I want him to stay and overall I hope that at some stage... he as well is focused on winning the next game, and certainly he will make his decision a bit later.

on whether it could go into the summer...
I don't think so, I think he will make his decision before the end of the season. He will not want to go to the World Cup and not have settled his situation because that would not be reasonable as well I think.

雲加：當然希望排名高過般尼

【now.com體育】阿仙奴領隊雲加坦言歐霸盃已成球隊餘下首要目標，但仍希望在英超力爭上游。

「這個周末是為下周四的比賽而戰。」雲加在剛召開的記者會上，表明下周日主場鬥韋斯咸時會收到主力，留力應付之後對馬德里體育會的歐霸盃大戰，「這不可說成大休息，是準備。歐霸盃是首要目標，因為在聯賽的上升空間有限。」

儘管如此，他表明不欲以一個差勁的排名結束聯賽：「當然，我們想排名在般尼之上，在英超尚有一些重要的比賽，我們希望以高位完成，所以是時候重新開始，看我們最終的排名。」阿仙奴目前33戰得54分排第6，僅比般尼多兩分。

在訪問中，雲加透露了最新軍情，包括艾朗藍斯可望對韋斯咸時披甲，而米希達利恩有望出戰馬德里體育會。他又重申希望韋舒亞留效，但暫沒有新消息可發表。

奧巴美揚：曾擔心與拿卡錫迪難合作

奧巴美揚一月加盟阿仙奴，此後表現頗獲好評，與隊友拿卡錫迪亦見化學作用。不過他近日透露因當年在法甲與不少里昂球員有「牙齒印」，曾一度擔心兩人未能合作。

作為阿仙奴身價最高球員，奧巴美揚不論在個人入球及為隊友作鋪路上都有不俗的表現，但曾效聖伊天的他承認曾擔心與前里昂射手拿卡錫迪難以合作：「拿卡錫迪曾效力里昂，而我是前聖伊天的球員。他是個好人，我加盟以來都對我很好。但老實說，我剛剛是有點擔心我們的關係，因為我過去與一些里昂球員確相處不來，不過我與拿卡錫迪則從沒問題。」

奧巴美美揚目前為槍手在英超上陣8次射入6球，而拿卡錫迪則在各項賽事攻入了13球。（Goal.com）

【now.com體育】周日對韋斯咸前，阿仙奴一眾球員拉大隊到倫敦一所賭場歡度了一晚，但輕鬆還輕鬆，領隊雲加則強調不會在聯賽放軟手腳。

英國《太陽報》拍到19名阿仙奴一隊球員周三晚集體現身於倫敦的Barracuda賭場，不要誤會，並非一眾兵工廠球員集體作反違規，報道指出他們是在會方安排之下輕鬆一下。

眾「槍手」這次到賭場除享有貴賓式招待，獲安排到私人廂房享受美酒佳餚之外，賭場更為他們準備了一點點籌碼作「小賭」之用，眾將如比利連、格列沙加和艾朗藍斯都盡慶而回，以輕鬆心情迎接對韋斯咸的聯賽比賽與下周的歐霸大戰。

阿仙奴今季在聯賽爭標無望，歐戰席位亦不甚穩健，唯一可以寄望的是歐霸盃，雖然阿仙奴領隊雲加表明歐霸盃是球隊現時首要目標，但仍未肯於本土戰線投降，稱已隊於主場表現不俗，須要保住酋長球場的主場氣勢。

“I managed the club with full commitment and integrity.

Arsene Wenger

Stan Kroenke:

Majority owner Stan Kroenke said: “This is one of the most difficult days we have ever had in all our years in sport. One of the main reasons we got involved with Arsenal was because of what Arsène has brought to the club on and off the pitch. His longevity and consistency over such a sustained period at the highest level of the game will never be matched.

“Arsène has unparalleled class and we will always be grateful to him. Everyone who loves Arsenal and everyone who loves football owes him a debt of gratitude. Three Premier League titles, including an entire season unbeaten, seven FA Cup triumphs and 20 successive years in the Champions League is an exceptional record. He has also transformed the identity of our club and of English football with his vision for how the game can be played.

“We have high ambitions to build on Arsène’s remarkable tenure and to honour his vision by ensuring that Arsenal competes for and wins the biggest and most important prizes in the game.

“We must now focus on making a strong finish to the season and ask our millions of fans around the world to join us in paying appropriate tribute to one of the greats of Arsenal’s history and one of the greats of the game.”

------------

控方日前向被告梁天琦展示本民前Facebook截圖，指本民前早於案發前一日，已發文呼籲市民於2016年2月8日年初一到旺角支援小販，非梁稱當日才決定。

惟辯方下午傳召前青年新政成員、現為九龍城區議員的鄺葆賢。鄺指，日前到庭旁聽，見控方展示截圖後，在手機用Facebook程式找出同一帖文，發現發文時間是「2016年2月8日」，在當日中午12時半發文，並曾在下午2時43分修改。鄺其後登出Facebook後，發現若沒有登入Facebook便瀏覽該帖文，發文時間便是「2016年2月7日晚上8時半」，計算後發現是加州時間，即Facebook總部的時間。

鄺在庭上解釋發文時間的運作時，曾指「你知網頁係用html寫㗎嘛」，控方一臉茫然，要求鄺慢慢解釋，因庭上很多人都不明白Facebook的運作，引得庭上的人哄堂大笑。當鄺指控方截圖時用加州時間時，控方又質疑「點解一定係加州，點解唔係英國時間」，鄺無奈指「時區唔係咁計㗎嘛」。
